items.title: Boeing (BA) Sees a More Significant Dip Than Broader Market: Some Facts to Know
items.description: In the most recent trading session, Boeing (BA) closed at $224.12, indicating a -2.45% shift from the previous trading day.

items.title: Don't underestimate the role of Palantir, AI in Iran conflict
items.description: Defense stocks — like Lockheed Martin (LMT), RTX (RTX), and Northrop Grumman (NOC) — are sliding in Tuesday's session amid escalations in the Middle East conflict after Israel bombed Iran and Lebanon. Baird Tech Strategist Ted Mortonson comes on Market Domination to discuss the role Palantir Technologies (PLTR) and other AI operators could have in Iran. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: General Dynamics, IBD's Stock Of The Day, Nears Entry On Improving Aerospace Outlook
items.description: General Dynamics is the IBD Stock Of The Day. Shares approach a buy point amid improving aerospace, air travel outlook.

items.title: ITA: Up 28% And Set For More Growth, Buy To Prepare For An Uncertain Future
Defense companies poised to ramp up production amid Iran war
items.description: Israel's airstrikes against Iran and Lebanon have Wall Street investors anxious over the risk these escalations could have on global markets if they continue for too long, as not only US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are seeing losses in Tuesday's session, but the defense industry as well. Gabelli Funds portfolio manager Tony Bancroft comes on Market Catalysts to discuss the defense manufacturer's inventory-production dynamic as Middle East conflicts ramp up and how he is forecasting increased capex spending for these contractors. Bancroft manages the Gabelli Commercial Aerospace and Defense ETF (GCAD). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.
